notes: 50% off for up to 6 (adults or youth). Children 2 and under free. Closed November–March. Must purchase tickets on Heritage website using discount code from library reservation.
raw: 508-888-3300 E-ticket. Pass admits up to six (6) people, adults or youth (children 2 and under are free) for 50% off entry admissions. Once you make your library reservation your will receive a discount code. You will then need to purchase your tickets through the Heritage website and use the code for your discount. Closed November, December, January, February and March. Annual membership of $300.00 provided by the Friends of Thayer Public Library. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
